moduleTitle: Introduction, Definitions, and Fundamentals of Visual Testing

lessons.title: What Is Visual Testing? History, Applications, and Terminology
objectives: Define visual testing (VT) and summarize its history as an NDT method
Identify common industrial applications of VT
Use standard VT terms and their meanings correctly
cp105Topics: 2.0 Definitions: standard terms and their meanings in the employer's industry

lessons.title: Fundamentals of Vision and Lighting
objectives: Describe how the human eye forms images and the basics of visual perception
Explain why adequate lighting is essential to a valid visual test
Recognize how vision limitations affect inspection reliability

lessons.title: Material Attributes, Environmental Factors, and Direct vs. Indirect Methods
objectives: Explain how material attributes such as surface condition affect what an inspector can see
Identify environmental factors that influence visual test results
Distinguish direct from indirect (remote) visual testing methods
